response.justification: Fourteen+ years of full-stack experience with consistent senior/staff-level roles and strong TypeScript/Node.js/React expertise directly matches core requirements. Current Staff role includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP development, addressing a critical required skill. Demonstrated testing and TDD culture. Minor gaps (Nest.js, Vitest not explicitly mentioned) are learnable given the depth of underlying skills.
strengths: Exceeds 6+ year requirement significantly with 14+ years at senior/staff seniority levels
Current role includes required AI-agent infrastructure and MCP development experience
Proven full-stack capability with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and strong testing/TDD culture
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned despite being primary framework in the role
Vitest and Playwright testing tools not mentioned in resume
Security, authentication, and authorization practices not explicitly highlighted in experience
